title: colutea arborescens subsp. cilicica
intro: Colutea arborescens subsp. cilicica, also known as the Cilician Bladderpod or Cilician Horsepod, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Colutea arborescens subsp. cilicica include its ability to treat kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
